title: Grilled Brazilian Sausage Skewers
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe featuring grilled Brazilian sausages on skewers with a hint of golden goodness.

ingredients.name: Brazilian sausages
ingredients.notes: Choose a combination of beef and pork or all beef for a more authentic experience

ingredients.name: Golden skewers
ingredients.notes: You can also use bamboo skewers and brush them with oil to prevent burning

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Red or yellow onion works best for this recipe

ingredients.name: Bell pepper
ingredients.notes: Green or red bell pepper adds a crunchy texture

ingredients.name: Zucchini
ingredients.notes: You can substitute with yellow squash for a similar taste

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a good quality olive oil for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a flaky sea salt for a more authentic taste

ingredients.name: Pepper
ingredients.notes: Use a freshly ground black pepper for the best flavor

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the Brazilian sausages, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini onto the golden skewers.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausages are cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them rest for a few minutes.
Serve the grilled Brazilian sausage skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
